content:
💡 deer-flow | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Orchestrating complex, long-running AI agent workflows for research, coding, and content creation.
✨ Key Features: • Super Agent Harness • Sub-agents orchestration • Memory management • Sandbox environments • Extensible skills and tools
📖 Summary: DeerFlow is an open-source super agent harness designed for long-horizon tasks. It orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes, powered by extensible skills, to research, code, and create complex outputs over extended periods.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
